SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANT III, ROBERT BURNS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEACH ROYALE LP $5,151.81 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,351.81, DEFENDANTS MONICA ZIMMERMAN DBA MARK ADAMS CO AND COW HOLLOW MANAGEMENT CO., LLC ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT DEDUCTED FROM THE DEPOSIT THE RENT BOARD FEE, AND ITEMS 1, 10, 12, AND 15 FOR THE ITEMIZED STATEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
